unlock_reasoning: MS-009 is unlocked because the table now has a public milestone ledger, a public development status page, public verifier links, a named release snapshot, and a documented receipt-backed automation state. This makes the current research state independently inspectable without requiring readers to inspect workflow logs.
not_claimed: This is not a claim that all transitions are 5/5 Receipt-backed.
This is not a claim of unbounded autonomy.
This is not a final publication release.
This is a named development snapshot of the current experimental table state.
